_comment: Simple GitHub Issue Example - Minimal configuration for triggering a task
_description: This example shows the minimal fields needed to trigger a task via GitHub Issue. Only requires role label and a goal (title or body section).
title: Implement user authentication feature
body: Implement a basic user authentication system with login and logout functionality.

labels._comment: Required: role label determines which expert role handles this task
labels.name: role:developer
labels.description: Assigns the task to the developer role

labels._comment: Optional: milestone label for tracking progress
labels.name: milestone:M001

_resulting_dispatch_payload._comment: This is what the adapter will generate from this Issue

context.task_scope: Implement a basic user authentication system with login and logout functionality.
